name: valetudo-helper-miioota
description: CLI tool to install firmwares via miio local OTA

scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run build_win && npm run build_lin_amd64 && npm run build_lin_armv7 && npm run build_mac_arm64
scripts.build_win: cross-env PKG_CACHE_PATH=./build_dependencies/pkg pkg -c package.json --targets node24-win-x64 --compress Brotli --no-bytecode --public --public-packages "*" dist/app.js --output ./build/valetudo-helper-miioota.exe
scripts.build_lin_amd64: cross-env PKG_CACHE_PATH=./build_dependencies/pkg pkg -c package.json --targets node24-linuxstatic-x64 --compress Brotli --no-bytecode --public --public-packages "*" dist/app.js --output ./build/valetudo-helper-miioota-amd64
scripts.build_lin_armv7: cross-env PKG_CACHE_PATH=./build_dependencies/pkg pkg -c package.json --targets node22-linuxstatic-armv7 --compress Brotli --no-bytecode --public --public-packages "*" dist/app.js --output ./build/valetudo-helper-miioota-armv7
scripts.build_mac_arm64: cross-env PKG_CACHE_PATH=./build_dependencies/pkg pkg -c package.json --targets node24-macos-arm64 --compress Brotli --no-bytecode --public --public-packages "*" dist/app.js --output ./build/valetudo-helper-miioota-mac-arm64
